Trigger.name: Add item
Trigger.script:
enableTrigger("Rents_item_name") enableTrigger("Rents_disable_item_name") rents.cost = f"{matches[2]} rent due"
if rents.clear_room then if rents.name then local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") local room if wotmudmapper then if table.size(wotmudmapper.currentID) == 1 then room = wotmudmapper.currentID[1] else room = 0 end else room = getPlayerRoom() end db:delete( rents_db.storage, db:AND(db:eq(rents_db.storage.room, room), db:eq(rents_db.storage.name, rents.name)) ) rents.clear_room = false end end

regexCodeList.string: \d+ items? stored for \d+ days?, (.+) rent due\.

Trigger.name: Rents_item_name
Trigger.script:
rents.item = matches[2]
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
if not rents.name then rents:echo("\nUnable to store item to rent database. Type \"score\" to capture character name.\n", false, true) else local room = getPlayerRoom() local zone = getRoomUserData(room, "zone") db:add( rents_db.storage, { name = rents.name, room = room, zone = zone, item = rents.item, cost = rents.cost } ) end

Trigger.name: Empty rent
Trigger.script: if rents.name then local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") local room = getPlayerRoom() db:delete( rents_db.storage, db:AND(db:eq(rents_db.storage.room, room), db:eq(rents_db.storage.name, rents.name)) ) end

regexCodeList.string: tells you, 'I don't have any items for you here\.'$

Trigger.name: Bank balance
Trigger.script:
local amount = tonumber(matches[3]) local coppers = amount%20 local crowns = (amount - coppers)/20
rents.cost = f"{crowns} gold crowns and {coppers} coppers"
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
if not rents.name then rents:echo("\nUnable to store bank balance to rent database. Type \"score\" to capture character name.\n", false, true) else
db:delete( rents_db.storage, db:AND(db:eq(rents_db.storage.item, "bank balance"), db:eq(rents_db.storage.name, rents.name)) )
db:add( rents_db.storage, { name = rents.name, item = "bank balance", cost = rents.cost } ) end

regexCodeList.string: ^A (.+) whispers to you 'Your balance is the equivalent of (\d+) copper.'$

Alias.name: Rents delete
Alias.script:
--deletes the ENTIRE rents database
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") db:delete(rents_db.storage, true) rents:echo("The entire rents database has been deleted.\n")

Alias.name: Rents delete name
Alias.script:
local name = matches[2]
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
db:delete(rents_db.storage, db:like(rents_db.storage.name, name)) rents:echo("All items for character \""..name.."\" have been removed from the rent database.\n")

Alias.name: Rents delete room
Alias.script:
local room = getPlayerRoom()
if matches[2] then room = tonumber(matches[2]) end
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
db:delete(rents_db.storage, db:eq(rents_db.storage.room, room)) rents:echo(f"All items for room \"{getRoomName(room)}\" have been removed from the rent database.\n")

Script.name: rents initializations
Script.script:
db:create( "rents", { storage = { name = "", room = 0, zone = "", item = "", cost = "", timestamp = db:Timestamp("CURRENT_TIMESTAMP"), }, } )
rents = rents or {} rents.version = "1.0" rents.name = rents.name or nil rents.clear_room = rents.clear_room or true rents.sort_by = rents.sort_by or "name" rents.sort_ascending = rents.sort_ascending or true
rents.help = [[ <cyan>Rent Script<reset>
This script will track items that you have stored in your rents in a database located at ]] .. getMudletHomeDir() .. [[/Database_rents.db
Below is a brief overview of some commands that this script includes. All commands can be found in the appropriate rents folder under mudlet aliases.
<cyan>Commands:<reset> <yellow>rents show<reset> - Show the rent database viewer
<yellow>rents delete<reset> - Delete the ENTIRE rent database. <red>Use with caution!<reset> <yellow>rents delete name character<reset> - Deletes all entries in the rent database for the provided character name. Not case sensitive. Examples: rents delete name Adael, rents delete name bludlust <yellow>rents delete room (roomID)<reset> - Deletes all entries in the rent database for the player's current room, or the provided roomID number if one is given. Examples: rents delete room, rents delete room 139
]]

Script.name: rents:echo
Script.script:
function rents:echo(what, debug, err) --colored tags for message echo local main_tag = "<lawn_green>(<green>rents<lawn_green>): <white>" local debug_tag = "<deep_sky_blue>(<royal_blue>debug<deep_sky_blue>): <white>" local err_tag = "<coral>(<red>error<coral>): <white>"
--if debug message and config debug is false, return without echoing if debug and not self.configs.dbug then return end
--if start of message is new line, print that before colored tags of message echo if what:sub(0,1)=="\n" then cecho("\n") what = what:sub(2) end cecho(main_tag) if debug then cecho(debug_tag) end if err then cecho(err_tag) end cecho(what) end

Script.name: rents:sys_disconnection
Script.script:
function rents:sys_disconnection(event) rents.name = nil rents.clear_room = true end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysExitEvent", "rents:sys_disconnection") registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDisconnectionEvent", "rents:sys_disconnection")

Script.name: rents rare items
Script.script: rents.rares = rents.rares or { "a heron-marked longsword", "a heron-mark blade", "a heron-marked greatsword", "a heron-marked foil", "a heron-engraved scabbard", "a belt bearing a dragon worked in silver", "a black shirt trimmed with lace", "an ornate chainmail shirt chased with gold", "a sinister black trident", "a massive war maul", "a tainted war maul", "a triple bladed dagger", "a steel warhammer", "a surcoat with exquisite embroidery", "a gown of exquisite design", "a silver medallion", "a shocklance", "a razor-sharp longsword", "a partisan bearing the arms of Ghealdan", "a pair of long-handled war axes", "a pair of gold-hilted hooked swords", "a nimble blade with a cuendillar pommel", "a feathered Kandori paramerion", "a diamond-tipped lance", "a darkened steel trident", "a crimson-hafted battleaxe", "a polished onyx-inlaid shield", "a jeweled wristcuff", "an obsidian encrusted sungwood staff", "a wicked knife bladed axe", "a polearm with a serrated catchpole", "a wildly-spiked axe", }

Script.name: rents angreal
Script.script: rents.angreal = rents.angreal or { "a disc of moonstone", "a greenish, translucent sphere", "a jade carving of an old man", "a many-faceted stone", "a necklace of fire sapphire", "a sculpted statuette", "a short, thick rod", "a small crystalline circlet", "a small crystalline globe", "a small stone dagger", "a wood carving of a bear", "an ivory figurine", "an orb filled with incandescent light", "a carved ivory pyramid", "Callandor", "a bracelet of twisted silver", }

Script.name: rents:parse_cost
Script.script:
function rents:str_to_coppers(cost) local COPPERS_PER_CROWN = 20
local crowns = cost:match("(%d+) gold crowns") local coppers = cost:match("(%d+) coppers") crowns = tonumber(crowns) or 0 coppers = tonumber(coppers) or 0 return crowns * COPPERS_PER_CROWN + coppers end
function rents:coppers_to_str(cost) local COPPERS_PER_CROWN = 20 local crowns = math.floor(cost / COPPERS_PER_CROWN) local coppers = cost % COPPERS_PER_CROWN
local res = f"{crowns}g {coppers}c" return res end

Script.name: rents:fit_to_width
Script.script: function rents:fit_to_width(s, width) local res if s:len() > width then res = f'{s:sub(1, width - 3)}...' else res = " " res = res:rep(width - s:len()) res = f'{s}{res}' end return res end

Script.name: rents:get_centered_coordinates
Script.script:
function rents:get_centered_coordinates() local w, h = getMainWindowSize()
self.width = w * 0.7 self.height = h * 0.7
local x = math.max(0, math.floor((w - self.width) / 2)) local y = math.max(0, math.floor((h - self.height) / 2))
return x, y end

Script.name: rents:fetch_records
Script.script:
function rents:fetch_records() local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") local records = db:fetch(rents_db.storage)
for _, rec in ipairs(records) do if rec.item == "bank balance" then rec.zone = "*Bank" rec.location = "*Bank" else local roomname = getRoomName(rec.room) or "" rec.location = f'{rec.zone}: {roomname}' end rec.coppers = self:str_to_coppers(rec.cost) end return records end

Script.name: rents:get_unique_values
Script.script: --return the unique values within the records for the given field function rents:get_unique_values(field) local res = {} for _, rec in ipairs(self.records) do table.insert(res, rec[field]) end --remove duplicates res = table.n_union(res, res) table.sort(res) return res end

Script.name: rents:get_zones_for_name
Script.script: --return all the zones within the records for the given name function rents:get_zones_for_name(name) local res = {} for _, rec in ipairs(self.records) do if name == "All" or rec.name == name then table.insert(res, rec.zone) end end res = table.n_union(res, res) table.sort(res) return res end

Script.name: rents:create_dropdown
rents:close_open_dropdown
Script.script: function rents:close_open_dropdown() if self.open_dropdown then self.open_dropdown.list:hide() self.open_dropdown = nil end self.click_catcher:hide() end

Script.name: rents:rebuild_location_dropdown
Script.script:
function rents:rebuild_location_dropdown(name) if self.select_location then self.select_location:delete() self.select_location = nil end
self.select_location = self:create_dropdown({ name = "rents.select_location", parent = self.window, x = "38%", y = "5%", width = "20%", height = "5%", options = self:get_unique_values("zone"), }) end

Script.name: rents:reset
Script.script: function rents:reset() self.input_all:print("") self.select_name:echo("All") self:rebuild_location_dropdown("All") self.input_item:print("") self.search_rare = false self:update_button_rare() self.search_angreal = false self:update_button_angreal() self.is_summary = false self:update_button_summary() self.sort_by = "name" self.sort_ascending = true end

Script.name: rents:build
rents:build_filters
rents:update_buttons
rents:build_display
rents:build_column_headers
rents:render_headers
rents:refresh
Script.script:
-- ============================================================ -- RENDERING HELPERS -- ============================================================ local function buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg) local fitted = rents:fit_to_width(text, width)
local function tag(fg, background) return string.format("<%d,%d,%d:%d,%d,%d>", fg[1], fg[2], fg[3], background[1], background[2], background[3]) end
if matchTerm and matchTerm ~= "" then local lowerFitted = fitted:lower() local lowerTerm = matchTerm:lower() local startIdx, endIdx = lowerFitted:find(lowerTerm, 1, true) if startIdx then local s = "" if startIdx > 1 then s = s .. tag(textColor, bg) .. fitted:sub(1, startIdx - 1) end s = s .. tag(highlightColor, bg) .. fitted:sub(startIdx, endIdx) if endIdx < #fitted then s = s .. tag(textColor, bg) .. fitted:sub(endIdx + 1) end return s end end return tag(textColor, bg) .. fitted end
local function renderHighlightedCell(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg) console:decho(buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg)) end
local function renderHighlightedLink(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, command, hint) console:dechoLink(buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg), command, hint, true) end
local function renderHighlightedPopup(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, actions, hints) console:dechoPopup(buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg), actions, hints, true) end
function rents:refresh() local odd_row_color = {20, 20, 28} local even_row_color = {0, 0, 0} local text_color = {185, 185, 185} local highlight_color = {128, 200, 255}
local console = self.console
local COLUMN_WIDTHS = {} local total_f = 0 local total_w = 0 for field, header in pairs(self.headers) do local f = header.width:match("(%-?%d+%.?%d*)%%") / 100 local w = self.display_container.get_width() * f / calcFontSize(console:getFontSize()) w = math.floor(w) --convert to integer number of letters
total_f = total_f + f total_w = total_w + w
local expected_w = self.display_container.get_width() * total_f / calcFontSize(console:getFontSize()) expected_w = math.floor(expected_w)
--account for rounding w = w + (expected_w - total_w)
COLUMN_WIDTHS[field] = w - 1 --account for space at the start end
self:render_headers()
local filters = self:get_active_filters() local records = self:filter_records(filters)
console:clear()
local function activeMatchFor(text, filter) if filter ~= "all" then return filter end if filters.all ~= "" and text:lower():find(filters.all, 1, true) then return filters.all end return "" end
local function gap(bg) console:setBgColor(unpack(bg)) console:echo(" ") end
--Summary mode if self.is_summary then local groups = {}
for _, rec in ipairs(records) do local key = rec.name .. "\n" .. rec.location if not groups[key] then groups[key] = { name = rec.name, location = rec.location, room = rec.room, coppers = 0, items = {}, } end table.insert(groups[key].items, {name = rec.item, coppers = rec.coppers}) groups[key].coppers = groups[key].coppers + rec.coppers end
local sorted = {} for k, v in pairs(groups) do table.insert(sorted, v) end
self:sort_records(sorted)
for i, grp in ipairs(sorted) do local bg = ((i % 2) == 1) and odd_row_color or even_row_color
local function cell(text, width, matchTerm) renderHighlightedCell(console, text, width, matchTerm, text_color, highlight_color, bg) end local function link(text, width, matchTerm, command, hint) renderHighlightedLink(console, text, width, matchTerm, text_color, highlight_color, bg, command, hint) end local function popup(text, width, matchTerm, actions, hints) renderHighlightedPopup(console, text, width, matchTerm, text_color, highlight_color, bg, actions, hints) end
console:setBgColor(unpack(bg))
gap(bg) cell(grp.name, COLUMN_WIDTHS.name, activeMatchFor(grp.name, filters.name ~= "all" and filters.name or "") )
gap(bg) if grp.room and grp.room > 0 then link(grp.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(grp.location, filters.location ~= "all" and filters.location or ""), function() centerview(grp.room) end, "Click to center map on room." ) else cell(grp.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(grp.location, filters.location ~= "all" and filters.location or "") ) end
--Item count cell gap(bg) local itemText = (#grp.items == 1 and "1 item" or f'{#grp.items} items') if #grp.items == 0 then cell(itemText, COLUMN_WIDTHS.item, activeMatchFor(itemText, filters.location)) else local hints = {} local actions = {} for _, itm in ipairs(grp.items) do local cost = self:coppers_to_str(itm.coppers) table.insert(hints, f" {itm.name} | {cost} ") table.insert(actions, "") end popup(itemText, COLUMN_WIDTHS.item, "", actions, hints) end
gap(bg) local cost = self:coppers_to_str(grp.coppers) cell(cost, COLUMN_WIDTHS.cost, "")
console:echo("\n") console:resetFormat() end
if #sorted == 0 then console:echo(" No matching results.\n") end
self.label_count:echo(string.format(#sorted == 1 and "%d result" or "%d results", #sorted)) self.label_count:setAlignment("center")
return end
--Individual record mode (default) self:sort_records(records) local count = #records
for i, rec in ipairs(records) do local bg = ((i % 2) == 1) and odd_row_color or even_row_color
local function cell(text, width, matchTerm) renderHighlightedCell(console, text, width, matchTerm, text_color, highlight_color, bg) end local function link(text, width, matchTerm, command, hint) renderHighlightedLink(console, text, width, matchTerm, text_color, highlight_color, bg, command, hint) end
console:setBgColor(unpack(bg))
gap(bg) cell(rec.name, COLUMN_WIDTHS.name, activeMatchFor(rec.name, filters.name ~= "all" and filters.name or "") )
gap(bg) if rec.room and rec.room > 0 then link(rec.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(rec.location, filters.location ~= "all" and filters.location or ""), function() centerview(rec.room) end, "Click to center map on room." ) else cell(rec.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(rec.location, filters.location ~= "all" and filters.location or "") ) end
gap(bg) cell(rec.item, COLUMN_WIDTHS.item, activeMatchFor(rec.item, filters.item))
gap(bg) local cost = self:coppers_to_str(rec.coppers) cell(cost, COLUMN_WIDTHS.cost, "")
console:echo("\n") console:resetFormat() end
if count == 0 then console:echo(" No matching results.\n") end
self.label_count:echo(string.format(count == 1 and "%d result" or "%d results", count)) self.label_count:setAlignment("center") end

Script.name: rents:start_live_timer
Script.script: function rents:start_live_timer() self.last_item_text = self.input_item:getText() self.last_all_text = self.input_all:getText() if self.live_timer then killTimer(self.live_timer) end self.live_timer = tempTimer(0.3, function() if not self.window then return end local okItem, itemText = pcall(function() return self.input_item:getText() end) local okAll, omniText = pcall(function() return self.input_all:getText() end) itemText = okItem and itemText or self.last_item_text omniText = okAll and omniText or self.last_all_text if itemText ~= self.last_item_text or omniText ~= self.last_all_text then self.last_item_text = itemText self.last_all_text = omniText self:refresh() end end, true) end

Script.name: rents:filter_records
Script.script:
function rents:get_active_filters() return { all = self.input_all:getText():lower(), item = self.input_item:getText():lower(), location = self.select_location.message:lower(), name = self.select_name.message:lower(), search_rare = self.search_rare, search_angreal = self.search_angreal, } end
function rents:filter_records(filters) local records = {}
for _, rec in ipairs(self.records) do local name = rec.name:lower() local zone = rec.zone:lower() local location = rec.location:lower() local item = rec.item:lower()
local match_all = (filters.all == "") or item:find(filters.all, 1, true) or name:find(filters.all, 1, true) or location:find(filters.all, 1, true)
local match_item = (filters.item == "") or item:find(filters.item, 1, true) local match_location = (filters.location == "all") or (zone == filters.location) local match_name = (filters.name == "all") or (name == filters.name)
local match_rare = true if filters.search_rare then match_rare = false for _, rare in ipairs(rents.rares) do if item:find(rare:lower(), 1, true) then match_rare = true break end end end
local match_angreal = true if filters.search_angreal then match_angreal = false for _, angreal in ipairs(rents.angreal) do if item:find(angreal:lower(), 1, true) then match_angreal = true break end end end
if match_all and match_item and match_location and match_name and match_rare and match_angreal then table.insert(records, rec) end end
return records end

Script.name: rents:sort_records
rents:show_hide
Script.script:
function rents:show() self.records = self:fetch_records()
if not self.window then self:build() end
self:reset() self:refresh() self:start_live_timer()
self.window:show() end
function rents:hide() self.records = nil if self.live_timer then killTimer(self.live_timer) self.live_timer = nil end end

Script.name: rents:rebuild
Script.script: function rents:rebuild() if self.window then self.window:delete() self.window = nil end self:show() end

Script.name: rents:resize
Script.script:
function rents:resize(event, container_name, width, height, x, y) --if the Adjustable.Container is not the rent window, return if container_name ~= "rents.window" then return end self:refresh() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("AdjustableContainerRepositionFinish", "rents:resize")
